description_en: Abidjan may not be a Muslim-majority destination, but it welcomes Muslim travelers with real halal options. You'll find 56 halal restaurants and 143 mosques nearby, plus real-time prayer times and the Qibla direction — everything to explore Abidjan, Côte d'Ivoire, with peace of mind.
metaDescription_en: Halal guide to Abidjan: 56+ halal restaurants, 143 mosques, prayer times and tips for Muslim travelers. Halal Trust Score 3.2/5.
